---
title: "MO sample redist code"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
#packages and files
library(alarmdata)
library(redist)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggredist)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork) # for plotting
map_MO <- alarm_50state_map('MO')
map_MO <- map_MO |>
    mutate(vote_tot = nrv + ndv)
```







  


# source of code:.
# https://alarm-redist.org/redist/


```{r}
map_MO2 = redist_map(map_MO, existing_plan=cd_2020, pop_tol=0.01,
total_pop = pop, adj = map_MO$adj)

MO_plans = redist_smc(map_MO2, nsims=500)



redist.plot.plans(MO_plans, draws=c("cd_2020", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5"), shp=map_MO2)
```





```{r}
MO_plans = MO_plans |>
    mutate(Compactness = comp_polsby(pl(), map_MO2),
           `Population deviation` = plan_parity(map_MO2),
           `Democratic vote` = group_frac(map_MO2, ndv, vote_tot))
#> Linking to GEOS 3.13.0, GDAL 3.8.5, PROJ 9.5.1; sf_use_s2() is TRUE

hist(MO_plans, `Population deviation`) + hist(MO_plans, Compactness) +
    plot_layout(guides="collect") +
    plot_annotation(title="Simulated plan characteristics")
```

```{r}
redist.plot.scatter(MO_plans, `Population deviation`, Compactness) +
    labs(title="Population deviation and compactness by plan")
```

```{r}

plot(MO_plans, `Democratic vote`, size=0.5, color_thresh=0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("black", "tomato2", "dodgerblue")) +
    labs(title="Democratic vote share by district")
```
